nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Developer guide for the RisingWave monitoring dashboard covering file structure, local development setup, testing against a live meta node, and deployment instructions for generating static HTML assets.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node.js package manifest for the RisingWave monitoring dashboard, listing React/Next.js dependencies, Protobuf tooling, and dev scripts for build and test.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the RisingWave dashboard, enabling strict mode, JSX support, and path aliases targeting the Next.js application structure.
